description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set within a spacious, fenced lot featuring manicured lawns and a variety of outdoor amenities. The main structure has a complex, multi-gabled roof and a prominent front entrance with symmetrical columns and a driveway leading to a garage. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a hot tub, and a dedicated patio area with outdoor seating, as well as a separate pergola or gazebo structure surrounded by trees. The landscaping is well-maintained, with hedges lining the property and mature trees providing shade and privacy. The windows are arranged in a balanced, symmetrical pattern, and the exterior is finished in light-colored materials with contrasting dark roofing. The overall design blends traditional and contemporary elements, creating a luxurious and inviting residential environment.
description: A spacious, modern bungalow with a multi-gabled roof, large windows, and extensive outdoor amenities including a pool, patio, and landscaped yard. The property is enclosed by fencing and features both traditional and contemporary architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and symmetrical landscaping with hedges and a clear view of the multi-gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, hot tub, patio area, and the rear facade of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and dense tree coverage, with the back of the bungalow and outdoor living spaces visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and a separate pergola or gazebo structure, along with the side elevation of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
